case_title: HORNE, MICHAEL R. VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANICSCO HEALTH DEPT.

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE SUBMITTED TO BE PLACED IN FILE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HORNE, MICHAEL R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANICSCO HEALTH DEPT. $1,376.17 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,391.17 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
